title: Sol Changelog
description: Astra example that renders the monorepo CHANGELOG.md as a versioned release viewer.
headSnippets: <meta property="og:description" content="Astra example that renders the monorepo CHANGELOG.md as a versioned release viewer.">

<style>:root{color-scheme:light dark}html[data-theme="dark"]{background:#0b1020;color:#e5e7eb}html[data-theme="light"]{background:#ffffff;color:#111827}body{font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,sans-serif;max-width:880px;margin:0 auto;padding:32px 24px;line-height:1.6}header{padding:16px 0 32px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.2);margin-bottom:32px}header h1{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:32px;letter-spacing:-0.02em}header p{margin:0;opacity:0.75;font-size:15px}.release-list{list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;display:grid;gap:12px}.release-list li{padding:16px 20px;border:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.3);border-radius:10px;transition:border-color .15s}.release-list li:hover{border-color:rgba(79,70,229,0.6)}.release-list a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;gap:16px}.release-list .version{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;color:#4f46e5}html[data-theme="dark"] .release-list .version{color:#a5b4fc}.release-list .date{font-size:13px;opacity:0.6}.release-meta{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;margin:8px 0 24px;font-size:14px;opacity:0.75}.release-meta a{color:#4f46e5;text-decoration:none}html[data-theme="dark"] .release-meta a{color:#a5b4fc}article h1{font-size:30px;margin:0 0 8px;font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;letter-spacing:-0.01em}article h2{font-size:20px;margin-top:24px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.2);padding-bottom:4px}article h3{font-size:16px;margin-top:20px;opacity:0.85}article ul{padding-left:20px}article code{background:rgba(120,120,120,0.15);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.9em}footer{margin-top:48px;padding-top:24px;border-top:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.2);text-align:center;opacity:0.7;font-size:13px}</style>
